历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 531→535→535→610→840, showing an overall backward trend, especially in 2024 (610) and 2025 (840) with two consecutive years of significant backward movement, accumulating a backward shift of about 230 places in the last two years; the 2025 baseline is about 840 places; the university's planned enrollment in Jiangxi for science/physics category: 53 in 2021, 61 in 2022, 62 in 2023, 60 in 2024, 64 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 52, a reduction of about 19% compared to 2025, a significant reduction that theoretically could ease competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking: 5th in 2021, stable at 6th from 2022 to 2026, firmly among the top universities nationwide; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving cafeteria management (999 yuan emperor crab incident) and not providing dormitories for professional master's students, but the overall impact is limited; Douyin popularity is high (total ranking 17th), with large short video exposure, positively influencing application interest; historical abnormal admission records include moderate attention in 2022 (differences in professional group admission lines), with no severe gaps; has 26 A-/A/A+ disciplines, including A+ disciplines such as Chinese Language and Literature, Chemistry, Geography, Geology, Foreign Languages and Literature, Atmospheric Science, Astronomy, Business Administration, Physics, Environmental Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, etc., with extremely strong disciplinary strength, continuously attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text:
Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering are highly popular/slightly hot in society, highly matching Nanjing University's advantageous disciplines; the total number of candidates in the province in 2026 is about 474,900, with an estimated physics category of about 267,800 based on recent proportions, roughly the same as 2025; Nanjing University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, a neighboring province to Jiangxi, with no obvious regional preference.
8. [Prediction Conclusion] Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings (especially the significant backward shift in 2024–2025), the planned enrollment reduction of about 19% in 2026 (easing competition), the university's top-tier level and high Douyin exposure (attracting more candidates), and other factors, the lowering effect of enrollment reduction on rankings and the backward trend offset each other; the predicted minimum ranking is about 746, with a range of 661–831.

- Software Engineering
- Software Engineering (Software Engineering Economics Innovation Class) (including dual degree)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Industrial Engineering, etc.)
- Technical Science Experimental Class (Intelligent Science and Technology, Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems, Digital Economy, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Earth Sciences and Resources and Environment)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematical and Physical Sciences)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Human Settlement Experimental Class) (Architecture, Urban and Rural Planning).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 661–831, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Electronic Information Class, Software Engineering, etc.) as the main choice, Tier 1 majors (Artificial Intelligence, Computer Science and Technology) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Earth Sciences and Resources and Environment, Mathematical and Physical Sciences) as a safe backup. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 661), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking 5th in 2021, stable at 6th from 2022–2026, firmly among the top universities nationwide; 2026 reputation evaluation slightly negative, mainly involving cafeteria management incidents and not providing dormitories for professional master's students, but overall impact limited; Douyin popularity high (total ranking 17), short video exposure large, positively influencing application interest; historical admission anomaly record of moderate concern in 2022 (professional group admission line differences), no severe gaps; has 26 A-/A/A+ disciplines, including liberal arts related A+ disciplines such as Chinese Language and Literature, Foreign Languages and Literatures, Business Administration, A-level disciplines including Philosophy, Law, Sociology, Theoretical Economics, etc., top liberal arts strength, strongly attractive to high-scoring liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.text:
Law, Chinese Language/Literature and other liberal arts majors socially hot/recommended, matching Nanjing University's advantageous disciplines; total number of candidates in this province for 2026 approximately 474,900, estimated history category about 207,100 based on recent proportions, roughly flat with 2025; Nanjing University located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, neighboring province to Jiangxi, no obvious regional preference bias.
